zh.Ipswich, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其
zh.Ipswich, Suff, Engl: 英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cutler於1501年之前出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親John Cutler II31歲，母親Agnes27歲。他於大約1517年與Julianne在英國素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年4月29日在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.Ipswich, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其
zh-hans.Ipswich, Suff, Engl: 英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cutler于1501年之前出生在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲John Cutler II31岁，母亲Agnes27岁。他于大约1517年与Julianne在英国素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年4月29日在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Cutler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of knives, from Middle English cutele, cutteler, coteler ‘cutler; maker, repairer, or seller of knives, etc.’ (Anglo-French cuteler, Old French coutelier, cotelier). Compare Nesmith and Cottle .
Americanized form of German Kottler or Kattler, which is of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Nesmith
meanings: English and Scottish (Glasgow): occupational name for a maker of knives, from Middle English knif-smith ‘knife-smith, cutler’ (Old English cnīf + smith).
English: alternatively, an occupational name connected with wheel making, from Middle English nave-smith ‘nave-smith’ (Old English nafu, nafa ‘nave, the central part of a wheel’ + smith).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cutler was born before 1501, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Cutler II, was 31 and his mother, Agnes, was 27. He married Julianne about 1517, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 April 1538, in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Cutler est né avant 1501, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Cutler II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Julianne environ 1517, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1538, à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Cutler vor 1501 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cutler II 31 und seine Mutter Agnes 27. Er hat um 1517 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England Julianne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1538 in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cutler è nato il prima del 1501 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Cutler II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Julianne circa 1517, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1538, nel Suffolk, England.

ja.Ipswich, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチ

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cutlerが1501年以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父John Cutler IIは31歳，母Agnesは27歳であった。約1517年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでJulianneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年4月29日にイギリススフォルクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cutler(이)가 1501년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cutler II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1517년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Julianne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 4월 29일 영국 수폴크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cutler nasceu antes 1501, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Cutler II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Julianne aproximadamente 1517, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1538, em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cutler родился перед 1501 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Cutler II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Julianne около 1517 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 апреля 1538 г. в местности суффолк, Англия.
